data.title: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) announces 2025 dividend allocation per share: $0.01 paid on 02/20/25.
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Ticker: ILPT) disclosed the dividend breakdown for 2025 tax-reporting purposes. For ILPT Common Shares, the dividend allocation per share amounts to $0.01. The record dates for this dividend were January 27, 2025, with the paid/payable dates falling on February 20, 2025. The dividend composition per share included $0.000 of Ordinary Income, $0.01 of Section 199A Dividend, $0.00 of Qualified Dividend, $0.00 of Total Capital Gain, $0.00 of Unrecaptured Section 1250 Gain, $0.00 of Section 897 Capital Gain, and $0.00 of Return of Capital.

data.title: Diversified Healthcare Trust reveals 2025 dividend allocation, $0.0100 per share, for tax reporting purposes.
data.description: Diversified Healthcare Trust (stock symbol: DHC) based in Newton, Massachusetts, released details regarding dividend allocations for the year 2025 tax reporting. The dividends for DHC Common Shares are as follows: Per Share Income Dividend of $0.0100, Unrecaptured Section 897 dividend of $0.0000, no Ordinary Dividend, no 199A Dividend, no Qualified Dividend, no Capital Gain Dividend, and no Capital Gain Return. The record date for these dividends is 01/27/25, with dividends paid/payable by 02/20/25.

data.title: Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) allocates 2025 dividends per share: Ordinary $0.01. No other dividend categories disclosed.
data.description: Service Properties Trust (SVC) based in Newton, Mass., revealed that for 2025 income tax reporting, dividends will be designated as follows: Each SVC Common Share will have an allocation per share for various categories including Ordinary Income, Unrecaptured Section 897 Gain, Section 199A Dividend, Qualified Dividend Income, Section 1250 Gain, and Capital Gain. The dividend amounts per share are $0.01 total, with $0.0000 for Unrecaptured Section 897 Gain, $0.0000 for Ordinary Income, $0.0000 for Section 199A Dividend, $0.0000 for Qualified Dividend Income, and $0.0 for Capital Gain. The dividends were paid or are payable on record dates falling on 01/27/25 and with payment dates on 02/20/25.

data.title: Mercedes-Benz of Arrowhead in Peoria, AZ is showcasing Certified Pre-Owned GLA SUVs, providing drivers in Phoenix area with a great selection.
data.description: Mercedes-Benz of Arrowhead in Peoria, Arizona, announced on January 20, 2026, that they are showcasing a range of Certified Pre-Owned Mercedes-Benz GLA SUVs. This presents drivers in Peoria and the wider Phoenix area with an attractive chance to purchase these vehicles.

data.title: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) announces 2025 dividend allocations per common share, including $0.35 total, $0.3054 as unrecaptured ordinary income.
data.description: A real estate investment trust, Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN), revealed the dividend breakdown for 2025 tax purposes. For each SEVN Common Share, the dividend allocation is detailed as follows: Ordinary Income - $0.3054, Section 199A Qualified Dividend - $0.0000, Section 1250 Capital Gain - $0.0000, Return of Capital - $0.0000. The total unrecaptured Section 897 gain per share is $0.35. The dividend was paid on 27th January 2025, with record and payable dates set as 20th February 2025.

data.title: River Valley Community Bancorp shares unaudited financial results for quarter and year ending Dec. 31, 2025, announces $0.07 dividend per share payable on Feb. 20, 2026.
data.description: Yuba City, California - On January 20th, 2026, River Valley Community Bancorp (OTC markets: RVCB) disclosed unaudited financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. The Bank, along with its subsidiary River Valley Community Bank, revealed a $0.07 per common share dividend scheduled for disbursement on February 20, 2026, designated for shareholders recorded as of January 30, 2026. For further details on the financial results, visit the Bank’s Investor Relations webpage at Investor Relations | River Valley Community Bank.

data.title: Bitcoin added to retirement annuity portfolio in Delaware Life, offering indirect exposure to the cryptocurrency via BlackRock index and spot Bitcoin ETF.
data.description: Investors wishing to include Bitcoin in their retirement portfolios can now do so through a product that offers indirect exposure to the cryptocurrency. This product utilizes a BlackRock index based on the company's spot Bitcoin ETF, allowing investors to access Bitcoin within their retirement accounts. The index provides a way for investors to benefit from Bitcoin's performance without directly owning the cryptocurrency. This option has garnered interest from retirement investors looking to diversify their portfolios with exposure to digital assets.
House China Panel sends letter to National Science Foundation

data.title: North American promotional products industry reaches record $27.7 billion sales in 2025, growth of 4.2%.
data.description: In Trevo, Pennsylvania, on January 20, 2026, it was reported that promotional products distributors in North America experienced a notable 4.2% increase in sales during 2025, achieving a record high of $27.7 billion. The data was released in the annual report by the Advertising Specialty Institute® (ASI), a premier source of information in the industry which oversees the $27+ billion market.

data.title: Harcum College to host Sealant Day for free preventative dental care in the community on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: In Bryn Mawr, Pennsylvania, on January 20, 2026, Harcum College is taking action to enhance oral health and overall wellness in the community by organizing Sealant Day. This special event aims to offer complimentary preventive dental services to individuals. The initiative is inclusive of both the general public and the Harcum College community, emphasizing the importance of dental care.
Infinite Eagle Acquisition Corp led by Harry Sloan, Jeff Sagansky, Eli Baker completes $300M IPO.

data.title: Karooooo's ARR growth increased by 28% to USD298 million. Cartrack had 22% Y/Y ARR growth, reaching ZAR5,106 million in Q3 2026.
data.description: Karooooo Limited disclosed robust performance and a promising future in the third quarter of 2026, concluding on November 30, 2025. The company holds full ownership of Cartrack and an 81% stake in Karooooo Logistics, operating as a group. During Q3 2026, significant financial achievements were noted: Cartrack's Software as a Service (SaaS) annualized recurring revenue (ARR) surged by 22% year-over-year (Y/Y) to ZAR5,106 million, while SaaS ARR in USD accelerated by 28% Y/Y, reaching USD298 million. Additionally, Cartrack's subscription revenue demonstrated growth.

data.title: Cadre Holdings boosts dividend: $0.10 per share quarterly, $0.40 annually, for common stockholders.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida, Cadre Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CDRE), a prominent manufacturer and distributor in safety equipment for law enforcement, first responder, military, and nuclear markets, disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share, totaling $0.40 annually. The dividend was approved by the Board of Directors.

data.title: Nextpower (Nasdaq: NXT) gets BBB- investment grade credit rating from Fitch, with Stable outlook.
data.description: In Fremont, California, Nextpower, a prominent player in providing smart power generation systems for solar plants, disclosed that Fitch Ratings has assigned its first-ever investment grade credit ratings. Fitch designated a BBB- Long-Term Issuer Default Rating to Nextpower, formerly Nextracker, with a Stable outlook. This development signifies a significant achievement for the company and showcases the robustness of their operations, boosting investor confidence.

data.title: Digital Interview AI funded on Kickstarter in under 6 hours, showing high demand for interview readiness solutions.
data.description: Digital Interview AI revealed on January 20, 2026, that its Kickstarter campaign achieved full funding in less than six hours. This success highlights the significant market interest in interview preparation tools due to the escalating competition in the job market. The swift funding attainment emphasizes the growing demand for solutions to enhance interview performance amid increasing competition.

data.title: Douglas Emmett (NYSE: DEI) discloses 2025 dividend tax breakdown: $0.275 per share income, gain, and return of capital.
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, Douglas Emmett, Inc. (NYSE: DEI), a real estate investment trust (REIT), disclosed the tax implications of its 2025 common stock dividends. Shareholders should seek advice from their tax advisors. The dividend details are as follows: The record date is 12/31, with the paid date to be announced. Dividends per share include ordinary income, capital gain, and return of capital. This includes the amount qualifying as a Section 199A dividend.

data.title: Energy Fuels Inc. will acquire Australian Strategic Materials to expand rare-earth production. New "mine-to-metal" champion forms.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Energy Fuels Inc., a prominent US company specializing in uranium, rare earth elements (REE), and critical materials, revealed its agreement to acquire all outstanding shares by entering a Scheme Implementation Deed (SID). As per the deal, Energy Fuels Inc. will obtain 100% of the issued share capital.

data.title: Airlock Digital releases independent study by Forrester Consulting showing measurable ROI & security impact of its technology.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Airlock Digital, known for its proactive application control and endpoint security solutions, recently revealed the findings of an independent study titled The Total Economic Impact (TEI) of Airlock Digital. The study, commissioned by Airlock Digital and carried out by Forrester Consulting, presented compelling insights into the economic benefits of implementing Airlock Digital's solutions. Released on January 20, 2026, the study sheds light on the significant impact of Airlock Digital's technology on businesses, showcasing concrete numbers and demonstrating the value proposition of their offerings.

data.title: Rio Tinto reported strong Q4 2025 production results, including record iron ore production in Pilbara. CEO praises operational excellence.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, the Chief Executive of Rio Tinto, Simon Trott, has highlighted the exceptional production performance of the company's operations. Trott mentioned that there was a significant increase in production on both a quarterly and annual basis, attributing this success to the company's focus on operating excellence and project delivery. Record quarterly iron ore production was achieved in the Pilbara region, following a robust recovery from weather-related disruptions earlier in the year. Additionally, a major milestone was celebrated at the Simandou project. The specific production numbers and financial details were not provided in the rephrased text.

data.title: MNTN to reveal Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on Feb 10, 2026. Webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on Feb 10.
data.description: New York-based technology platform MNTN (NYSE: MNTN) will be reporting its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025, after the US markets close on Tuesday, February 10, 2026. The company's management will be conducting a live webcast on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results and offer a business update. The webcast details are as follows: Date - Tuesday, February 10, 2026.
